subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, worthy and befitting, Who hath with a single radiance illumined the horizons of discord with the light of unity and concord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بیک اشراق آفاق نفاق را بنور توحید و اتفاق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
